title: Shri Chandraghanta Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Chandraghanta Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Chandraghanta.
description:
Jai Maa Chandraghanta sukh dham,
Purn keejo mere kaam॥
Chandra samaj tu sheetal daati,
Chandra tej kirno mein samati॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

Man ki malak man bhati ho,
Chandraghanta tum var daati ho.
Sundar bhav ko lane wali,
Har sankat mein bachane wali॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

Har budhwar jo tujhe dhyaye,
Shraddha sahit jo vinay sunaye.
Murti Chandra aakar banaye,
Sanmukh ghee ki jyot jalaye॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

Sheesh jhuka kahe man ki baata,
Purn aas karo jagat data.
Kanchipur sthan tumhara,
Karnatika mein maan tumhara॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

Naam tera ratu maharani,
Bhakt ki raksha karo Bhavani॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥
